title: Potato Cannon Additions
description: Makes the create potato cannon able to fire more food items.
body:
Adds support for a variety of new food items to the potato cannon, each with their own unqiue stats!

Food items supported from the following mods:

Cultural Delight: 
- Avocado - Similar to potato
- Eggplant - Medium fire rate (15 ticks), 6 damage, high knockback
- White Eggplant- Standard fire rate (10 ticks), 4 damage, reduced knockback

Expanded Delight: 
- Peanut - Fast fire rate (8 ticks), 4 damage, low gravity and fast projectile speed. Fires two projectiles, only one needs to hit to do the full damage of 4. 
- Pepper - Medium fire rate (22 ticks), 10 damage, slightly increased gravity, very fast projectile with reduced drag. High Knockback.

Pineapple Delight: 
- Pineapple - Slow fire rate (30 ticks), 16 damage, high gravity.

More Delight: 
- Diced Potatoes - Slow fire rate (30 ticks), 15 damage, high gravity, slow projectile speed. Fires 6 projectiles, only one need to hit to do the full damage of 15.

Farmers Delight: 
- Rice - Medium Fire Rate (18 ticks), 8 damage, slightly increased gravity. Fires 8 projectiles, only one needs to hit to do the full damage of 8.
